series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with permits to allow persons to have duck blinds on state parks. This series includes, but is not limited to: any registration information, fees, fines, or other records related to duck blind permits.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor ; Paper: State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor
